metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Ravenridge.

towns.name: Ravenridge
towns.description: A quiet hamlet nestled among rolling hills, known for its warm hearths.

key_dungeons.name: Silent Halls
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Silent Halls gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Silent Halls of evil and secure the Amethyst Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
